ksa_text: Skill in developing regulatory compliance training programs tailored to different organizational roles and competency levels, including content design, delivery method selection, and effectiveness measurement.

dcwf.top_element_label: Support necessary compliance activities (e.g., ensure system security configuration guidelines are followed, compliance monitoring occurs).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-S-009 (RC, Skill) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4495 is insufficient to establish relevance to quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and financial analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.449, onet=0.410, nice=0.408) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4495 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RC-domain KSA RC-S-009 (composite 0.4495) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RC domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per GDPR, CCPA, SOX; compliance competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data handling obligations, not compliance program ownership. Composite 0.4495 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RC domain KSA at composite 0.4495 is not a standard requirement for Quantitative Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4495, domain RC, scope weak fit. High confidence.
